title: Replying to email chains for anyone
excerpt: Replying to email chains for anyone in the organisation regardless of whether I have been cc’d. Helps if you’re stepping into a project for someone and want to continue with the original thread.

posts.author: Bridget1 (Bridget McDonald)
posts.cookedHtml: Replying to email chains for anyone in the organisation regardless of whether I have been cc’d. Helps if you’re stepping into a project for someone and want to continue with the original thread.
